sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps_table (ts1 TIMESTAMP, ts2 TIMESTAMP);
UPDATE timestamps_table SET ts1 = greatest(ts1, TIMESTAMP '2023-07-01 12:00:00');
SELECT ts1, ts2, greatest(ts1, ts2) AS latest_timestamp FROM timestamps_table;
DELETE FROM timestamps_table WHERE greatest(ts1, ts2) < TIMESTAMP '2023-05-01 12:00:00';
